_description: Verified product facts for social media posts. Bot must not claim features that contradict these facts.

cli_package.name: @cveriskpilot/scan
cli_package.price: Free (local scans). Enriched data requires API key (paid tier).

does: Enrich with NVD, EPSS, CISA KEV
Connector sync (Tenable, Qualys, CrowdStrike, Rapid7, Snyk)

claims_to_avoid: Do NOT say the CLI generates POAMs — only the web platform does
Do NOT say the CLI does AI triage — only the web platform does
Do NOT say 'zero-day detection' — the tool maps known CVEs, not discovers new ones
Do NOT claim SOC 2 certification — the tool maps TO SOC 2 controls, it does not certify
Do NOT say 'real-time' for the CLI — it runs on-demand, not continuously
